distinguishes.reason: This crossed input combines STANDARD tier with 75000 cents, materially above the 12000-cent maximum in all automatically processed traces, separating the tier rule from the high-amount rule while exposing any high-value priority exception.

Using the unresolved high-value region with STANDARD tier tests whether priority handling overrides the observed tier split; before/after state and recorded side effects can also reveal whether quarantine movement occurs within the workflow or is deferred.

expectedInformationGain: Maximum among the remaining contrasts: the prior VIP-at-low-amount trace strongly favored tier over the proposed 12000-cent split, so a STANDARD DAMAGED return at 75000 cents probes the opposite crossed cell, the unresolved high-value priority exception, rule precedence, and inventory-movement timing in one workflow without duplicating an executed input.
